Bash(python -c "
import struct, os

def check_img\(path\):
    with open\(path, 'rb'\) as f:
        header = f.read\(8\)
    if header[:2] == b'\\xff\\xd8':
        fmt = 'JPEG'
    elif header[:8] == b'\\x89PNG\\r\\n\\x1a\\n':
        fmt = 'PNG'
    else:
        fmt = 'Unknown'
    size = os.path.getsize\(path\)
    print\(f'{os.path.basename\(path\)}: {fmt}, {size} bytes'\)

check_img\(r'P:/_clients/dakona/dax/docs/lexi_avatar_384.png'\)
check_img\(r'P:/_clients/dakona/dax/docs/Dakona_Logo_-_Wordmark.png'\)
")
